emails.subject: RE: Neural Networks
emails.body: Here is the EOL information Dutch To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: Neural Networks
emails.body: Dutch, I need the bid/offer spread as well. For each transaction, I need the prevailing bid/offer spread. Could you get that quickly? I will wait for that right now. I am out tomorrow and would like to work on this on the weekend. Thanks, Ravi Thuraisingham, CFA Director, Storage Trading Enron Broadband Services p 713.853.3057 c 713.516.5440 pg 877.680.4806 ravi.thuraisingham@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Neural Networks
emails.body: we do not have that data

emails.subject: RE: Neural Networks
emails.body: Okay, you don't save them? The price on E col, is that mid? Ravi Thuraisingham, CFA Director, Storage Trading Enron Broadband Services p 713.853.3057 c 713.516.5440 pg 877.680.4806 ravi.thuraisingham@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Neural Networks
emails.body: the price on the eol data that you have is the bid or the offer depending on if the trade is a buy or a sell we buy is our bid and when we sell it is our offer

emails.subject: RE: Neural Networks
emails.body: Cool. Then I have the bid/offer. Thanks for your help! Ravi Thuraisingham, CFA Director, Storage Trading Enron Broadband Services p 713.853.3057 c 713.516.5440 pg 877.680.4806 ravi.thuraisingham@enron.com
